description: You are a medical scientist studying Type 2 diabetes. You need to verify the preproinsulin coding sequence in a human insulin gene GenBank record located at ~/UGENE_Data/human_insulin_gene.gb. Identify the primary Open Reading Frame (ORF) with a minimum length of 300 nucleotides that encodes the preproinsulin protein and translate it into an amino acid sequence. Export the translated protein sequence in FASTA format to ~/UGENE_Data/results/insulin_protein.fa and save the sequence with the ORF annotations as a GenBank file to ~/UGENE_Data/results/insulin_annotated.gb. Create a characterization report at ~/UGENE_Data/results/insulin_characterization.txt including the ORF start and end nucleotide positions, the protein length in amino acids, the estimated molecular weight in Daltons, and the total count of cysteine residues.
